
```{r}
options(scipen = 999)

county %>%
  summarise(
    neg_n1 = sum(n1 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_n2 = sum(n2 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00100 = sum(a00100 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00200 = sum(a00200 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00300 = sum(a00300 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00600 = sum(a00600 < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

zipdat %>%
  summarise(
    neg_n1 = sum(n1 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_n2 = sum(n2 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00100 = sum(a00100 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00200 = sum(a00200 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00300 = sum(a00300 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00600 = sum(a00600 < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

county %>%
  summarise(
    zero_n1 = sum(n1 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_n2 = sum(n2 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_a00100 = sum(a00100 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_a00200 = sum(a00200 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_a00300 = sum(a00300 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_a00600 = sum(a00600 == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

zipdat %>%
  summarise(
    zero_n1 = sum(n1 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_n2 = sum(n2 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_a00100 = sum(a00100 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_a00200 = sum(a00200 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_a00300 = sum(a00300 == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    zero_a00600 = sum(a00600 == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

county %>%
  filter(a00100 < 0 | a00200 < 0 | a00300 < 0 | a00600 < 0) %>%
  select(year, state, county_name, a00100, a00200, a00300, a00600) %>%
  head(30)

#n1 (Number of returns), n2 (Number of individuals), a00200 (Salaries and wages amount), a00300 (Taxable interest amount), and a00600 (Ordinary dividends amount) should all be non-negative. By contrast, a00100 (Adjusted Gross Income, less deficit) can in principle take negative values. That said, the pattern of negative a00100 values differs substantially across the two tables, which suggests that this variable deserves closer checking.
```




```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(data.table)

clean_soi_numeric <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x %in% c("", "NA", "N/A", "(1)")] <- NA
  x <- gsub(",", "", x)
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

read_one_county_file <- function(file_path, year) {
  raw <- read_xls(file_path, col_names = FALSE)

  
  dat <- raw %>% slice(-(1:8))

  
  dat <- dat[, 1:9]

  names(dat) <- c(
    "state_fips", "county_fips", "county_name",
    "n1", "n2", "a00100", "a00200", "a00600", "a00300"
  )

  dat <- dat %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
    mutate(
      state_fips  = trimws(state_fips),
      county_fips = trimws(county_fips),
      county_name = str_squish(county_name)
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(state_fips),
      !is.na(county_fips),
      !is.na(county_name),
      state_fips != "",
      county_fips != "",
      county_name != "",
      grepl("^\\d+$", state_fips),
      grepl("^\\d+$", county_fips)
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      year = year,
      state = str_extract(basename(file_path), "[A-Z]{2}(?=\\.xls$)"),
      state_fips  = sprintf("%02d", as.integer(state_fips)),
      county_fips = as.integer(county_fips),
      across(c(n1, n2, a00100, a00200, a00600, a00300), clean_soi_numeric)
    ) %>%
    select(year, state_fips, state, county_fips, county_name,
           n1, n2, a00100, a00200, a00600, a00300)

  dat
}

build_county_panel_for_year <- function(folder_path, year) {
  files <- list.files(folder_path, pattern = "\\.xls$", full.names = TRUE)

  panel_list <- lapply(files, function(f) read_one_county_file(f, year))
  panel <- bind_rows(panel_list)

  panel <- panel %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(county_name),
      county_name != "",
      !(is.na(n1) & is.na(n2) & is.na(a00100) &
          is.na(a00200) & is.na(a00600) & is.na(a00300))
    )

  panel
}

panel_2008 <- build_county_panel_for_year(
  "../raw_data/soi/county/2008_states/2008 County Income",
  2008
)

panel_2009 <- build_county_panel_for_year(
  "../raw_data/soi/county/2009_states/2009 County Income",
  2009
)

dim(panel_2008)
dim(panel_2009)

panel_2008 %>% filter(state == "AK") %>% head(10)
panel_2009 %>% filter(state == "AK") %>% head(10)

panel_2008 %>% filter(is.na(county_name))
panel_2009 %>% filter(is.na(county_name))

fwrite(panel_2008, "../output/soi_county_2008_clean.csv")
fwrite(panel_2009, "../output/soi_county_2009_clean.csv")

county_all <- fread("../output/soi_county_panel_1989_2022.csv")

county_all_keep <- county_all %>%
  filter(!year %in% c(2008, 2009))

names(county_all_keep)
names(panel_2008)
names(panel_2009)

county_all_new <- bind_rows(
  county_all_keep,
  panel_2008,
  panel_2009
) %>%
  arrange(year, state_fips, county_fips)

county_all_new %>%
  count(year) %>%
  filter(year %in% c(2007, 2008, 2009, 2010))

county_all_new %>%
  filter(
    year %in% c(2008, 2009),
    is.na(county_name) |
      (is.na(n1) & is.na(n2) & is.na(a00100) & is.na(a00200) & is.na(a00300) & is.na(a00600))
  )
```
```{r}
# recheck
#NA
county_all_new %>%
  filter(
    is.na(county_name) |
    county_name == "" |
    (is.na(n1) & is.na(n2) & is.na(a00100) & is.na(a00200) & is.na(a00300) & is.na(a00600))
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, state) %>%
  select(year, state, county_fips, county_name, n1, n2, a00100, a00200, a00300, a00600)

# find the number of rows have some problem
county_all_new %>%
  count(year) %>%
  arrange(year)

county_fixed <- county_all_new %>%
  group_by(year, state_fips, state, county_fips, county_name) %>%
  summarise(
    n1     = if (all(is.na(n1))) NA_real_ else sum(n1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n2     = if (all(is.na(n2))) NA_real_ else sum(n2, na.rm = TRUE),
    a00100 = if (all(is.na(a00100))) NA_real_ else sum(a00100, na.rm = TRUE),
    a00200 = if (all(is.na(a00200))) NA_real_ else sum(a00200, na.rm = TRUE),
    a00600 = if (all(is.na(a00600))) NA_real_ else sum(a00600, na.rm = TRUE),
    a00300 = if (all(is.na(a00300))) NA_real_ else sum(a00300, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, state_fips, county_fips)

county_fixed %>%
  count(year) %>%
  arrange(year)

county_fixed %>%
  summarise(
    neg_n1 = sum(n1 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_n2 = sum(n2 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00100 = sum(a00100 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00200 = sum(a00200 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00300 = sum(a00300 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00600 = sum(a00600 < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

county_fixed %>%
  filter(
    n1 < 0 | n2 < 0 | a00200 < 0 | a00300 < 0 | a00600 < 0 | a00100 < 0
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, state, county_name) %>%
  select(year, state, county_fips, county_name, n1, n2, a00100, a00200, a00300, a00600)

county_fixed <- county_fixed %>%
  mutate(
    n1     = ifelse(n1 == -1, NA, n1),
    n2     = ifelse(n2 == -1, NA, n2),
    a00200 = ifelse(a00200 == -1, NA, a00200),
    a00600 = ifelse(a00600 == -1, NA, a00600)
  )

county_fixed %>%
  summarise(
    neg_n1 = sum(n1 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_n2 = sum(n2 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00100 = sum(a00100 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00200 = sum(a00200 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00300 = sum(a00300 < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    neg_a00600 = sum(a00600 < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```
```{r}

```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

county <- fread("../output/soi_county_panel_1989_2022_revised.csv")
zipdat <- fread("../output/soi_zip_panel_2004_2022_revised.csv")

key_vars <- c("n1", "n2", "a00100", "a00200", "a00300", "a00600")


county_overview <- tibble(
  panel = "County SOI panel",
  n_rows = nrow(county),
  n_counties = nrow(distinct(county, state_fips, county_fips)),
  n_years = n_distinct(county$year),
  earliest_year = min(county$year, na.rm = TRUE),
  latest_year = max(county$year, na.rm = TRUE)
)

zip_overview <- tibble(
  panel = "ZIP SOI panel",
  n_rows = nrow(zipdat),
  n_zips = nrow(distinct(zipdat, state_fips, zipcode)),
  n_years = n_distinct(zipdat$year),
  earliest_year = min(zipdat$year, na.rm = TRUE),
  latest_year = max(zipdat$year, na.rm = TRUE)
)

county_overview
zip_overview


county_availability <- bind_rows(lapply(key_vars, function(v) {
  x <- county[[v]]
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    earliest_year_available = min(county$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    latest_year_available = max(county$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    nonmissing_n = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

zip_availability <- bind_rows(lapply(key_vars, function(v) {
  x <- zipdat[[v]]
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    earliest_year_available = min(zipdat$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    latest_year_available = max(zipdat$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    nonmissing_n = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

county_availability
zip_availability

county_stats <- bind_rows(lapply(key_vars, function(v) {
  x <- as.numeric(county[[v]])
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_obs = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

zip_stats <- bind_rows(lapply(key_vars, function(v) {
  x <- as.numeric(zipdat[[v]])
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_obs = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

county_stats
zip_stats

county_year_counts <- county %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_counties = n_distinct(county_fips),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

zip_year_counts <- zipdat %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_zips = n_distinct(zipcode),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

county_year_counts
zip_year_counts
```
